title: Nassella macrathera

This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may aid in the management of conditions like arthritis and oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Nassella tenuissima include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and sesquiterpenes, which are responsible for its therapeutic properties. Nassella tenuissima is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support joint health and immune function.
taxonomy: Nassella macrathera is a species of grass in the genus Nassella. Nassella macrathera is classified under the family Poaceae, commonly known as the grass family.
